NIBSDescription: ccPAS recorded as two single-coil event types: ccPAS_PMv (Coil_1) and ccPAS_M1 (Coil_2), each repeated 100 times at 0.2 Hz. The 8 ms intra-pair interval is the onset offset between the two rows in *_events.tsv.

ElementSet.Description: Coil over left ventral premotor cortex (PMv).

IntensitySet.MeasurementMethod: EMG MEP from right first dorsal interosseous
EMG MEP from right first dorsal interosseous

NavigationSystem.NavigationNotes: Frameless stereotaxy; coils tracked optically and co-registered to the individual MRI.

nibs_event_id.Description: Identifier of a stimulation event type (one per coil). Linked to nibs_event_id in *_events.tsv. MUST be unique within this file.

nibs_element_id.Description: Single coil for this row. Links to ElementSet.ElementID.

stimulus_shape.Description: Waveform shape of the base stimulus.

Levels.Biphasic: Biphasic pulse as per stimulator setting

first_inflection.Description: Direction of the first induced-current deflection.

current_direction.Description: Direction of current flow in the coil winding, read with the coil in the calibration-block orientation (stimulating face away from the viewer, top face toward the viewer, handle or leading edge pointing away). cl and co apply to circular coils; cl-co and co-cl apply to figure-of-eight coils and name the left wing then the right wing.

Levels.cl: Circular coil, single winding, current clockwise
Levels.co: Circular coil, single winding, current counterclockwise
Levels.cl-co: Figure-of-eight coil, left wing clockwise, right wing counterclockwise
Levels.co-cl: Figure-of-eight coil, left wing counterclockwise, right wing clockwise
Levels.other: Coil geometry not covered by cl/co/cl-co/co-cl; the actual current flow is described in this text

stimulus_intensity.Description: Delivered amplitude of this coil's pulse.

pattern1_count.Description: Number of times this coil's pulse is delivered (one per pair).

intensity_reference.Description: Anchor used to set the intensity. Links to IntensitySet.IntensityID.

intensity_scaling.Description: Multiplier on the reference value, or 'absolute'.
